case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CO.
